properties.name: bpmnflow.config-path
properties.description: Path to the YAML validation/extraction config consumed by bpmn-model-parser. Supports {@code classpath:} and absolute filesystem paths.

properties.name: bpmnflow.expose-api
properties.description: When true, registers a REST controller at {@code /bpmnflow/**} exposing workflow inspection and navigation endpoints. Default: true.

properties.name: bpmnflow.model-path
properties.description: Path to the BPMN model file. Supports {@code classpath:} and absolute filesystem paths.
